nodes.text: The constraint is never what you think it is. Most businesses fail to grow because they optimize the wrong thing. Find the one thing blocking 10x growth before doing anything else.
Grand Slam Offer: make an offer so good people feel stupid saying no. Stack value, remove risk, add urgency. Price is irrelevant when the value is clear.
Volume cures most things. Most people give up before the feedback loop kicks in. Do more reps, collect more data, iterate faster — outwork the uncertainty.
The four levers of business: get more customers, get customers to buy more, get customers to buy more often, keep customers longer. Everything maps to one of these.
Skills compound. The highest ROI activity is becoming so good at one skill that it makes everything else easier. Sales, writing, and recruiting are the three that unlock everything else.
Acquisition.com portfolio model: take equity stakes in businesses, provide operational expertise instead of cash. Profitable at every stage because the portfolio companies pay for the help.
Speed of implementation is a competitive advantage. Most people wait for perfect information. Move fast, measure, correct. The market gives you data that no amount of planning can.
Content strategy: give away the best stuff for free. It filters for serious people, builds trust at scale, and the sale becomes obvious to anyone who consumed the content.
